Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Off Calendar

Prove-Up; Request For Telephonic Appearance
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.
Daniel Herns, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CIT COMMUNICATIONS FI
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PATRICIAL CRAMER, individually and doing business as WORLD SCHOOL OF MASSAGE AND HOLISTIC HEALING ARTS, and doing business as AORLD SCHOOLS L.L.C. and doig business as WORLD SCHOOL OF MASSAGE AND HOLISTIC HEARLING ARTS ASSOC. L.L.C.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $10,107.15
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,353.00
Attorney's Fees: $13,427.40
Costs: $1,487.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $29,375.35
Judgment signed in open court.
